mnemonics: MAP Your Functions for Data Science (M-A-P: Map, Apply, Applymap)
keyPoints: Use `map()` for element-wise operations on a Series.
Use `apply()` for row/column-wise or more complex operations on a DataFrame.
Use `applymap()` for element-wise operations on an entire DataFrame (though it is being deprecated for `map()`).
commonMistakes: Using `apply()` for a simple task that a vectorized operation (like adding two columns) could handle much more efficiently.
